scripts.check: bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run format:check
scripts.generate:openapi:reelshelf: DOTNET_SKIP_FIRST_TIME_EXPERIENCE=1 DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT=1 ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=OpenApi dotnet build api/Reelshelf.csproj /p:OpenApiGenerateDocumentsOnBuild=true /p:OpenApiDocumentsDirectory=$PWD/frontend/src/api-client --disable-build-servers
scripts.generate:api-client:reelshelf: bun run generate:openapi:reelshelf && bun run --cwd frontend generate:api-client
scripts.check:api-client-drift: bun run generate:api-clients && prettier --write "frontend/src/api-client/**/*.ts" && git diff --exit-code -- frontend/src/api-client
